help.title: Help
help.about:
Quran Memorization Assistant

Version: 1.0.0

Created by: Youness Fael Khair

License: MIT Open Source
help.instructions:
How to Use

  1. Select language
  2. Select chapter
  3. Input starting verse
  4. Input ending verse
  5. Input number of repeats
  6. Click 'Start Listening' to start
  7. Click 'A+' to increase font size
  8. Click 'A-' to decrease font size
  9. Click 'Start Listening' to stop
help.audio_files:
Additional Audio Files

Download audio files from:
Link: Every Ayah Download Page

URL: https://everyayah.com/recitations_ayat.html

Unzip/Place audio files in: audio directory

error.no_reciters: No reciters found. Please add folders to: %1
